ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the media content */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast members involved in the media content */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the media content */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the media content was added to the system */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the media content was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media content in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media content */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the media content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of media content (e.g., TV Show, Movie) */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the content */,
  "content_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the content's thumbnail image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the content's trailer */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the content (e.g., PG, R, TV-14) */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the content belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number for TV shows */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number for TV shows */,
  "parent_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent content (for sequels, prequels, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES content_producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Production company of the producer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the producer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the producer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the producer's account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content being distributed */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor handling the content */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was distributed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the content is distributed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., Pending, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the distribution record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_distribution_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_distribution_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the distributor */,
  "regions_served" TEXT /* Regions served by the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the distributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the distributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the distributor's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the distributor's account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was viewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., Mobile, Desktop, TV) */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the view record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the view record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, producer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user's account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the series was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
